name: simisear
flavor_texts: It loves sweets because they become energy for the fire burning inside its body.
A flame burns inside its body. It scatters embers from its head and tail to sear its opponents.
When it gets excited, embers rise from its head and tail and it gets hot. For some reason, it loves sweets.
text: Simisear is the Ember Pokémon. It is a fire-type Pokémon. Abilities: gluttony, blaze (hidden). Base stats — HP: 75, Attack: 98, Defense: 63, Sp. Atk: 98, Sp. Def: 63, Speed: 101. Evolution line: pansear → simisear. Lore: It loves sweets because they become energy for the fire burning inside its body. A flame burns inside its body. It scatters embers from its head and tail to sear its opponents. When it gets excited, embers rise from its head and tail and it gets hot. For some reason, it loves sweets.
